title: Heuristic LOC Prediction Output
description: Output of the predict-loc-heuristic skill. Counts ACs + screens and applies the README § Scope Metrics formula.

spec_path.description: Absolute path to the analysed spec file.

ac_count.description: Total acceptance criteria across all user stories.

screens.description: Distinct UI screens detected in `## UI / Mockup`.

severity.description: Band determined by README § Scope Metrics thresholds.

by_story.description: Per-story AC breakdown for traceability and debugging.

story_id.description: Story heading text, e.g. 'US-1: Stream decoded session events'.
